metadata.description: Managed-autonomy workflow for Claude Code: 11-step loop with audit/critique skills, four-lens parallel staff-review, diff-focused security + a11y reviews (with per-diff early-exit on docs-only PRs), agent-isolated planner + docs helpers, project-config-driven ship + ship-spike pipelines with stale-base preflight gate, plus consumer-side template directory (web / swift / tauri-rust-ts stacks) and bootstrap + migration docs.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Managed-autonomy 11-step loop. Bundles the skeptical reviewers (auditor + plan-critic), the four-lens parallel staff-review (engineer / UX-designer / design-engineer / push-further), diff-focused /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review, /flow:ship + /flow:ship-spike pipelines, /flow:workflow-help, planner + docs context-isolation agents, portable rules (general, plan-discipline, documentation, exploration), memory-corpus tool, flow.config.json JSON Schema (16 slots), and default hooks. v1.2.1 adds consumer-feedback follow-ups: stale-base preflight gate in /flow:ship + ship-spike + staff-review (FB-0008); marketplace install verification in bootstrap+migration docs (FB-0005); workflow-step assumption surfacing in /flow:ship Step 1.0; per-diff early-exit in /flow:security-review + /flow:accessibility-review for docs-only PRs (FB-0006+FB-0007).
